title: elymus hispidus subsp. podperae
intro: Elymus hispidus subsp. podperae, also known as Podpera's wheat grass or Elymus hispidus, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elymus hispidus subsp. podperae include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
